name: wgpu-ol-renderer
description: GPU-first geospatial rendering pipeline for OpenLayers (foundation layer)

scripts.build:bench: npm run build && vite build --config vite.bench.config.ts
scripts.test:geojson-worker: npm run build:bench && playwright test tests/geojson-worker.spec.ts
scripts.verify:pan-zoom: npm run build:bench && playwright test tests/pan-zoom-bench.spec.ts
scripts.bench:pan-zoom: npm run build:bench && vite preview --config vite.bench.config.ts --port 4174 --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.build:demo: npm run build && vite build --config vite.demo.config.ts
scripts.demo: npm run build:demo && vite preview --config vite.demo.config.ts --port 4175 --host 127.0.0.1
